description: Customer master data including demographics, signup info, and acquisition channel. Use for customer counts, signup analysis, and acquisition breakdowns.

columns.name: zip
columns.description: Postal code for customer location, joins to geography.zip

columns.name: acquisition_channel
columns.description: How the customer was acquired: organic_search, social_media, paid_search, referral, etc.

description: Order-level transactional data. Contains order status, payment method, device type, order source, and order date. Use for order counting, status analysis, and channel breakdowns.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Customer who placed the order, joins to customers.customer_id

columns.name: zip
columns.description: Shipping postal code, joins to geography.zip

columns.name: order_status
columns.description: Current status: delivered, shipped, cancelled, returned, processing, etc.

columns.name: payment_method
columns.description: Payment method: credit_card, cod, debit_card, wallet, etc.

columns.name: device_type
columns.description: Device used to place order: mobile, desktop, tablet

columns.name: order_source
columns.description: Source of the order: app, web, paid_search, organic_search, social

grain: one row per order line item
description: Line-item detail for each order. Contains product, quantity, price, discount, and promo info. Use for revenue calculation, discount analysis, and promo tracking.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Product in this line item, joins to products.product_id

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Quantity ordered for this line item

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Price per unit at time of order

columns.name: discount_amount
columns.description: Discount applied to this line item

columns.name: promo_id
columns.description: Primary promo code applied, NULL or NO_PROMO if none

columns.name: promo_id_2
columns.description: Secondary promo code applied, may be NULL

description: Product master data with attributes like category, segment, size, color, price, and cost. Use for product-level, category-level, or segment-level analysis.

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Product segment within category, e.g. Premium, Budget

columns.name: size
columns.description: Product size, e.g. S, M, L, XL

columns.name: color
columns.description: Product color, e.g. Red, Blue, Black

columns.name: cogs
columns.description: Cost of goods sold for the product

description: Geographic lookup mapping zip codes to city, region, and district. Use for location-based breakdowns joined to customers or orders via zip.
Pre-aggregated daily Revenue and COGS totals. Use this for quick daily total revenue/COGS queries that do not need customer, product, or order detail.

columns.name: COGS
columns.description: Total cost of goods sold for the day

grain: one row per product per snapshot date
description: Periodic inventory snapshots tracking stock levels, supply metrics, fill rates, and flags. Use for stock analysis, reorder analysis, and sell-through trends.

columns.name: stockout_days
columns.description: Number of days product was out of stock

columns.name: stockout_flag
columns.description: True if product had a stockout in the period
